# Snov.io — Pricing

## Plans

| Plan | Annual Billing | Key Features |
|------|----------------|-------------|
| **Starter** | $29.25/mo (Save $117/yr) | 1,000 credits, 5,000 recipients, 3 mailbox warm-ups, unlimited monthly emails, unlimited team seats |
| **Pro** | $74.25/mo (Save $297/yr) | 5,000 credits, 25,000 recipients, unlimited warm-ups, unlimited monthly emails, unlimited team seats |
| **Custom Ultra** | Contact Sales | 200,000+ credits, 400,000+ recipients, rollover credits, priority support, bulk email management |

## Add-ons

| Add-on | Price | Features |
|--------|-------|----------|
| **LinkedIn Automation** | $62/mo per slot | 10% discount on annual billing |

## Included in All Plans

- Unlimited campaigns
- Bulk search
- 7-tier verification
- CRM integration
- API access
- Team collaboration

## Email Finder Credits (all plans)

| Feature | Starter | Pro S | Pro M | Pro L | Ultra |
|---------|---------|-------|-------|-------|-------|
| Email Search (single) | 1,000 | 5,000 | 20,000 | 50,000 | 100,000 |
| Bulk Email Search | 5,000 | 20,000 | 50,000 | 100,000 | — |
| Domain Search | 1,000 | 5,000 | 20,000 | 50,000 | 100,000 |
| LinkedIn Search | 5,000 | 20,000 | 50,000 | 100,000 | — |
| Database Search | 1,000 | 5,000 | 20,000 | 50,000 | 100,000 |

## Email Verification Credits (same credit pool)

| Feature | Starter | Pro S | Pro M | Pro L | Ultra |
|---------|---------|-------|-------|-------|-------|
| Email Verifier (single) | 1,000 | 5,000 | 20,000 | 50,000 | 100,000 |
| Bulk Email Verifier | 5,000 | 20,000 | 50,000 | 100,000 | — |
| 7-tier verification | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Greylisting bypass | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |

## Credit Model
- 1 credit = 1 email found (valid or unknown) or 1 email verified
- 0 credits if email is not found / not valid
- All finder, verifier, and outreach actions draw from the same credit pool

## TCO Notes
- Starter ($39/mo) is viable for solo operators at low volume
- Pro S ($99/mo) unlocks premium warm-up pool and unlimited warm-up — the sweet spot
- Credits, warm-up, sequences, and inbox are all included — no add-on costs
- Annual billing saves 25% — Pro S annual = $74.25/mo effective
